title: Misidentification and lack of access to personal information leads to mistaken four-year debt pursuit
summary: A collection agency (the “organization”) was pursuing an individual for a debt owed on a credit card account. The individual asserted that it was not his credit card account. The individual claimed that the organization had been calling him at his home for several years and had disclosed his personal financial information to other members...
dedupKey: misidentification and lack of access to personal information leads to mistaken four year debt pursuit|2015-08-01
